title: Iron Furnaces
description: Inspired by cpw's Iron Chests mod, adds a few different tiers of furnace.
body:
Maximize smelting efficiency with unparalleled speed, reconfigurable sides, augments for smoking and blasting, and much more.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aTsri2PvSis" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Can you craft the Rainbow Furnace and unlock its POWER? 

![Rainbow Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ff288fb90998a54369a29deaddea220a562352.png)

Got any questions? Read the Wiki!

 

Version Status

1.21.x: Active Development

 

Iron Furnaces should be compatible with most mods. 

It has explicit compatibility with JEI and Project MMO.

 

The textures used from the Thermal Series are used with CoFH permission.

 

Change log: [https://github.com/Qelifern/IronFurnacesNeoForge/blob/4.3.2/ifchangelog.txt](https://github.com/Qelifern/IronFurnacesNeoForge/blob/4.3.2/ifchangelog.txt)
